subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath been received, and the servant in attendance hath laid it before the Wronged One, whereupon We have answered thee through this glorious Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و عرضه العبد الحاضر لدی المظلوم و اجبناک بهذا اللوح العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for forgiveness
